title: Module Hotspot from Cell Damage
impact_factor: Localized heating can reduce string output and create escalating reliability risk when bypass diodes or cracked cells remain in service.

title: Performance Loss from Tracker Twist
impact_factor: Row torsion creates uneven plane-of-array angle, cosine loss, row-to-row shading, and persistent mismatch that can depress production across an entire tracker block.

title: Tracker Wind Stow Production Losses
impact_factor: Gust-triggered stow events move trackers away from the optimal tracking angle, creating modeled and actual production losses that can be materially higher than hourly weather data suggests.
